zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Gaunt於1069年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Gilbert de Gant21歲，母親Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle19歲。她於1087年與Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy在英國林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1140年之後在英國林可爾史爾包恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Gaunt于1069年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Gilbert de Gant21岁，母亲Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle19岁。她于1087年与Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy在英国林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1140年之后在英国林可爾史爾包恩。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gant
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gauntt
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Gaunt  .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Gaunt was born in 1069, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Gilbert de Gant, was 21 and her mother, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, was 19. She married Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy in 1087, in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1140, in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Gaunt est née en 1069, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gilbert de Gant, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy en 1087, à Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1140, à Bourne, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Gaunt 1069 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de Gant 21 und ihre Mutter Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle 19. Sie hat 1087 in Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1140 in Bourne, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Gaunt è nata il nel 1069 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Gilbert de Gant, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy nel 1087, nel Folkingham, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1140, nel Bourne, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Gauntが1069年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Gantは21歳，母Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risleは19歳であった。1087年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガムでAlan Percy 2nd Lord Percyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1140年以後にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボウルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Gaunt(이)가 1069년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Gant(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1087년 영국 링코실르 폴킨그함에서 Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1140년 이후 영국 링코실르 본에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Gaunt nasceu em 1069, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Gilbert de Gant, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy em 1087, em Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1140, em Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Gaunt родилась в 1069 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Gant было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy в 1087 г. в местности фолкингхам, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1140 г. в местности бурн, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Gaunt nació en 1069, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Gilbert de Gant, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alix 'Alicia Alice' De Montfort Comtesse Sur-Risle, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Alan Percy 2nd Lord Percy en 1087, en Folkingham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1140, en Bourne, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
